## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `bun run check`
- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run check:boundaries`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run doctor` for React-facing desktop changes

## Notes

Mention screenshots, known tradeoffs, follow-up work, or anything reviewers should focus on.
